final_prompt: A realistic study desk scene at night: three open notebooks stacked on the left, a black laptop in the center displaying a simple line chart, two silver pens crossed in front of the laptop, a warm desk lamp on the right casting soft amber light, a small cactus behind the lamp, cinematic shadows and low-key lighting.
prompt_before: A realistic study desk scene at night: three open notebooks stacked on the left side, a black laptop in the center showing a simple line chart, two silver pens crossing each other in front of the laptop, a warm desk lamp on the right, and a small cactus behind the lamp, cinematic shadows.
